challenge.explanation:
Sophie potiče tim da održava kvalitet koda prateći specifične smernice, kao što je korišćenje ispravne strukture petlje, uključivanje jasnih komentara i pokretanje svih testova pre predaje.

Pažnja na rečenicu koja prethodi Let's make sure....
challenge.instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje je navedeno/nalazi se ispod.

questions.text:
Sophie je htela da podseti tim o zahtevima koje moraju pratiti. Evo njenog e-maila:

Subject: Reminder: Follow the Requirements Carefully

Hi team,

I hope you're all doing well! I wanted to send a quick reminder about the key requirements we must follow when submitting our code. To ensure everything runs smoothly, we must be thorough and follow these steps:

1. Use the correct loop structure - In some cases, a while loop should be used instead of a for loop to account for all edge cases. Please review the logic carefully before submitting your code.

2. Include comments - You should add clear comments explaining complex parts of your code. This makes it easier for others to understand and maintain.

3. Run the test suite - Before submission, you must run all tests. This could help catch errors early and save time later.

Let's make sure we follow these guidelines to maintain code quality and avoid unnecessary issues. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out!

Best,

Sophie

Kako Sofija podstiče tim da održava kvalitet koda?

answers.answer: Da im kažemo da napišu što je moguće više koda.
answers.feedback: Previše koda nije uvek bolje — kvalitet je važniji od kvantiteta.

answers.answer: Da ih podsetimo da prate važne smernice.

answers.feedback: Sophie naglašava da je testiranje potrebno pre predaje.

answers.answer: Preporučuje se da pravila kodiranja budu opciona.
answers.feedback: Sophie jasno objašnjava da moraju biti praćene smernice kako bi se izbegli problemi.

challenge.title: Vežbanje od 50
